name: Pillow Club in Spain
overview: Four former Pillow Club friends, Laura, Miša, Kristina, and Maria, meet by chance in Spain. There, as a joke, they decide to perform a ritual to make their greatest wishes come true. However, things don’t go the way they expect. The Padjaklubi comeback brings the beloved characters together under the warm sun, where they face new troubles while constantly stumbling into humorous mishaps.
